title: Andromeda's Create Modpack
description: A Create extra full based modpack port for 1.20.1 with more create addons compatible for solo gamemod.
body:
# Setup

This modpack contains only the solo version, with both client and server-side mods.
If you are looking for server-side only or client-side only version, you should check out later in august 2024.

You can download the modpack and directly start playing.
It is possible that the mod **[WorldEdit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit/files/4586218)** is not downloaded directly via Modrinth. If so, you can download it **[here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit/files/4586218)** and add it manually via unlocking the modpack instance in the settings, after the download.

⚠️**WORLDEDIT IS NOT NEEDED TO LAUNCH THE GAME, THIS IS A COMFORT OPTION**⚠️

# Goal

This is a 1.20.1 port of the modpack [Create Extra](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-extra) (visit the page for more info) with more create mods but less optimization mods.
This modpack was created mainly for content creation purposes, as used on Twitch by [@KAndromeda](https://www.twitch.tv/kandromeda).

**This is not optimised for potato computers.**

# Contents

Were added to the modpack:
- [Better end sky](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-end-sky)
- [Better trim tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-trim-tooltips)
- [Calcmod](https://modrinth.com/mod/calcmod)
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)
- [Cluttered Creative](https://modrinth.com/mod/cluttered-creative)
- [Create: Contraption Creatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-contraption-creatures)
- [Create: Aquatic Ambitions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aquatic-ambitions)
- [Create: Cobblestone](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-cobblestone)
- [Create: Contraption Terminals](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-contraption-terminals)
- [Create: Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco)
- [Create: Deco Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco-additions)
- [Create: Man of Many Planes](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-man-of-many-planes)
- [Create: Ore Excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation)
- [Create: Railways Navigator](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-railways-navigator)
- [Create Tab Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tab-fix)
- [Create Track Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-track-map)
- [Create: Utilities](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-utilities)
- [Create: Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-bellsandwhistles)
- [Create: Big Contraptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-big-contraptions)
- [Create: Cards](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-cards)
- [Create: Coins Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-coins-arise)
- [Create: Copper & Zinc](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-copper-zinc)
- [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats)
- [Create: Design n' Decor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-design-n-decor)
- [Create: Dreams & Desires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dreams-and-desires)
- [Create: High Pressure](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-high-pressure)
- [Create: Lazy Engines](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazy-engines)
- [Create: Metalwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-metalwork)
- [Create: More Farmables](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-farmables)
- [Create: New Age](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)
- [Create: Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatics)
- [Create: Oxidized](https://modrinth.com/mod/create_oxidized)
- [Create: Peaceful](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-peaceful-compat)
- [Create: Power Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-power-loader-fabric)
- [Create: Simple Ore Doubling](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-simple-ore-doubling)
- [Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
- [Create: Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/fxnt-create-storage)
- [Create: Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-structures)
- [Create: Train Perspective Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-train-perspective-fix)
- [Create: Ultimate Factory](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ultimate-factory)
- [Create: Crystal Clear](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-crystal-clear)
- [Fabric Skyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes)
- [Fastload](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [JMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap-integration)
- [Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled)

- [Saro's Create Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/saros-create)
- [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared)
- [ToolTip Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix)
- [Twitch Chat Bridge](https://modrinth.com/mod/twitch-chat)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
- [Yeetus Experimentus](https://modrinth.com/mod/yeetus-experimentus)
- And some mods presents in [Create Extra](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-extra)

Some mods were removed for compatibility reasons.

If you want to see the mods in details, you should visit the contents/dependencies page.

# Credits

None of the mods used in this modpack belongs to me, go visit the pages of the mods/ressource packs/datapacks to have more informations about them.

The modpack [Create Extra](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-extra) was originally made by [BondiBen](https://modrinth.com/user/bondiben) and [GideonWhite1029](https://modrinth.com/user/GideonWhite1029).

Also, here is my twitch channel, where you can see the modpack in action:

[![Twitch channel preview](https://imgur.com/rDqDnUbs.png)](https://www.twitch.tv/kandromeda)
